abilities.name: From the Hip
abilities.description: Uses Grace instead of Intellect when making Long Arms attacks.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.description: May choose to ignore one Critical Effect per Dramatic Time.

actions: (1) Brahl'blade (Melee) | AV: 3 (8) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. This weapon may not declare Triggers.

(1) Refurbished Blackpowder Rifle (Long Arms) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/2/8 damage. Range +10 for each ? from Focused. Capacity 1, Reload 2. ? Punch Through: After damaging, deal 1/2/4 to second character within 3 yards, behind first target.
system.notes: Catalan hunters trained to use Grace-based rifle technique. Hard to kill and tough. Hit and run tactics with refurbished black powder rifle.
